Title: EndoBot: An LLM Workflow-Driven Agent for Intelligent Gastrointestinal Endoscopy Consultation
Venue: Springer Science and Business Media LLC
Abstract:
Abstract
                Background
 Gastrointestinal endoscopy plays an irreplaceable and critical role in the early screening and diagnosis of tumors, and a standardized endoscopic examination procedure is essential for ensuring the quality of the procedure. Patient education regarding gastrointestinal (GI) endoscopy procedures—such as colonoscopy and gastroscopy—requires access to accurate, up-to-date information on preparation, risks, and post-procedure care.
